creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 232511
updated diff for adding a lang/ruby-platform port (no flavors integration)

This updated diff may be usable for testing a lang/ruby-platform meta-port.

As a known limitation, It may need updating for a more normal package-name syntax and flavors support, e.g ruby30-platform@ruby30 for a build under ruby30 ... when ruby30 is not the default ruby version, otherwise e.g ruby-platform@ruby30 if ruby30 is the default ruby version. 

I'd like to test out flavor support for gem.mk before adding that additional feature to it though.
